name: hubspot-mcp-summary
description: Repository Name: hubspot-mcp-summary Repository Description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for managing shared summaries in HubSpot. This project integrates with HubSpot's CRM to create, update, delete, and fetch summary records (stored as Note engagements) through a unified, role-based interface.
